migrations.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pha_eventdef_ext (
       code VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,
       section VARCHAR(64),
       operator_hint VARCHAR(512),
       gmp_critical BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pha_esign_record (
       id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
       entity_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
       entity_id VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
       signer VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
       meaning VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL,
       comment_text VARCHAR(512),
       signed_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pha_serial_record (
       serial_code VARCHAR(128) PRIMARY KEY,
       job_no VARCHAR(64),
       lot_id VARCHAR(64),
       gtin VARCHAR(32),
       parent_code VARCHAR(128),
       status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'COMMISSIONED',
       created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

source.body: {"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "defs", "sql": "SELECT d.code, d.name, d.event_class, COALESCE(x.section, '') AS section, COALESCE(x.operator_hint, '') AS operator_hint, CASE WHEN x.gmp_critical THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS gmp_critical, d.requires_length, d.requires_time, d.requires_comment, d.oee_bucket, COALESCE(d.six_big_loss, '') AS six_big_loss, d.sort_order FROM emc_operations_event_definition d LEFT JOIN pha_eventdef_ext x ON x.code = d.code WHERE (? = '' OR x.section = ?) ORDER BY d.sort_order, d.code", "params": ["${input.section}", "${input.section}"]}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${defs}", "fields": {"code": "${item.code}", "name": "${item.name}", "eventClass": "${item.event_class}", "section": "${item.section}", "operatorHint": "${item.operator_hint}", "gmpCritical": "${item.gmp_critical}", "requiresLength": "${item.requires_length}", "requiresTime": "${item.requires_time}", "requiresComment": "${item.requires_comment}", "oeeBucket": "${item.oee_bucket}", "sixBigLoss": "${item.six_big_loss}", "sortOrder": "${item.sort_order}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectOne", "var": "lot", "sql": "SELECT lot_id, status, COALESCE(disposition, '') AS disposition FROM emc_material_lot WHERE lot_id = ?", "params": ["${input.lotId}"]}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "lot", "error_code": "LOT_NOT_FOUND", "error_message": "Lot not found"}, {"type": "failIfNotEquals", "var": "lot.disposition", "equals": "QUARANTINE", "error_code": "INVALID_STATE", "error_message": "Release allowed only from QUARANTINE"}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "UPDATE emc_material_lot SET disposition = 'RELEASED', status = 'STOCK', version_no = version_no + 1 WHERE lot_id = ?", "params": ["${input.lotId}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO pha_esign_record (id, entity_type, entity_id, signer, meaning, comment_text) VALUES (RANDOM_UUID(), 'LOT', ?, ?, 'APPROVED', NULLIF(?, ''))", "params": ["${input.lotId}", "${input.by}", "${input.comment}"]}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "lotId": "${input.lotId}", "disposition": "RELEASED"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectOne", "var": "lot", "sql": "SELECT lot_id, COALESCE(disposition, '') AS disposition FROM emc_material_lot WHERE lot_id = ?", "params": ["${input.lotId}"]}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "lot", "error_code": "LOT_NOT_FOUND", "error_message": "Lot not found"}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "guard", "sql": "SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (VALUES ('QUARANTINE'), ('RELEASED')) v(d) WHERE d = ?", "params": ["${lot.disposition}"]}, {"type": "failIfNotEquals", "var": "guard.cnt", "equals": "1", "error_code": "INVALID_STATE", "error_message": "Reject allowed from QUARANTINE or RELEASED"}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "UPDATE emc_material_lot SET disposition = 'REJECTED', status = 'BLOCKED_QC', version_no = version_no + 1 WHERE lot_id = ?", "params": ["${input.lotId}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO pha_esign_record (id, entity_type, entity_id, signer, meaning, comment_text) VALUES (RANDOM_UUID(), 'LOT', ?, ?, 'REVIEWED', NULLIF(?, ''))", "params": ["${input.lotId}", "${input.by}", "${input.reason}"]}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "lotId": "${input.lotId}", "disposition": "REJECTED"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "sigs", "sql": "SELECT entity_type, entity_id, signer, meaning, COALESCE(comment_text, '') AS comment_text, signed_at FROM pha_esign_record WHERE (? = '' OR entity_id = ?) ORDER BY signed_at DESC", "params": ["${input.entityId}", "${input.entityId}"]}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${sigs}", "fields": {"entityType": "${item.entity_type}", "entityId": "${item.entity_id}", "signer": "${item.signer}", "meaning": "${item.meaning}", "comment": "${item.comment_text}", "signedAt": "${item.signed_at}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.serialCode", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "serialCode required"}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "dup", "sql": "SELECT serial_code FROM pha_serial_record WHERE serial_code = ?", "params": ["${input.serialCode}"]}, {"type": "when", "then": [{"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "DUPLICATE_SERIAL", "error_message": "Serial code already registered", "serialCode": "${input.serialCode}", "status": ""}}], "var": "dup", "notNull": true}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO pha_serial_record (serial_code, job_no, lot_id, gtin, parent_code, status) VALUES (?, NULLIF(?, ''), NULLIF(?, ''), NULLIF(?, ''), NULLIF(?, ''), 'COMMISSIONED')", "params": ["${input.serialCode}", "${input.jobNo}", "${input.lotId}", "${input.gtin}", "${input.parentCode}"]}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "serialCode": "${input.serialCode}", "status": "COMMISSIONED"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "serials", "sql": "SELECT serial_code, COALESCE(gtin, '') AS gtin, COALESCE(lot_id, '') AS lot_id, COALESCE(job_no, '') AS job_no, COALESCE(parent_code, '') AS parent_code, status, created_at FROM pha_serial_record WHERE (? = '' OR job_no = ?) ORDER BY created_at, serial_code", "params": ["${input.jobNo}", "${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${serials}", "fields": {"serialCode": "${item.serial_code}", "gtin": "${item.gtin}", "lotId": "${item.lot_id}", "jobNo": "${item.job_no}", "parentCode": "${item.parent_code}", "status": "${item.status}", "createdAt": "${item.created_at}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectOne", "var": "lot", "sql": "SELECT lot_id FROM emc_material_lot WHERE barcode = ?", "params": ["${input.barcode}"]}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "lot", "error_code": "LOT_NOT_FOUND", "error_message": "Lot not found"}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.targetQty", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "targetQty required"}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.actualQty", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "actualQty required"}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "same", "sql": "SELECT CASE WHEN ? = ? THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS v", "params": ["${input.weighedBy}", "${input.verifiedBy}"]}, {"type": "when", "then": [{"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "SECOND_PERSON_REQUIRED", "error_message": "Second person verification required", "lotId": "", "actualQty": ""}}], "var": "same.v", "equals": "1"}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "tol", "sql": "SELECT CASE WHEN ABS(CAST(NULLIF(?, '') AS NUMERIC) - CAST(NULLIF(?, '') AS NUMERIC)) <= CAST(NULLIF(?, '') AS NUMERIC) * CAST(NULLIF(?, '') AS NUMERIC) / 100 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS v", "params": ["${input.actualQty}", "${input.targetQty}", "${input.targetQty}", "${input.tolerancePct}"]}, {"type": "when", "then": [{"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "TOLERANCE_EXCEEDED", "error_message": "Weight deviation exceeds tolerance", "lotId": "", "actualQty": ""}}], "var": "tol.v", "equals": "0"}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO pha_esign_record (id, entity_type, entity_id, signer, meaning, comment_text) VALUES (RANDOM_UUID(), 'DISPENSE', ?, ?, 'AUTHORED', CONCAT('target=', ?, ' actual=', ?))", "params": ["${lot.lot_id}", "${input.weighedBy}", "${input.targetQty}", "${input.actualQty}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO pha_esign_record (id, entity_type, entity_id, signer, meaning, comment_text) VALUES (RANDOM_UUID(), 'DISPENSE', ?, ?, 'REVIEWED', CONCAT('target=', ?, ' actual=', ?))", "params": ["${lot.lot_id}", "${input.verifiedBy}", "${input.targetQty}", "${input.actualQty}"]}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "lotId": "${lot.lot_id}", "actualQty": "${input.actualQty}"}}]}

\"qtyDeclared\", \"label\": \"\u041a\u043e\u043b\u0438\u0447\u0435\u0441\u0442\u0432\u043e\", \"type\": \"number\", \"defaultValue\": \"1\"}, {\"name\": \"createdBy\", \"label\": \"optionsLabelField\": \"name\", \"defaultValue\": \"EMP-H03\"}]"}]}

bindings.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS v FROM emc_material_lot WHERE disposition = 'QUARANTINE'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS v FROM emc_defect_record WHERE status IN ('REGISTERED', 'CONFIRMED')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS v FROM emc_job_order WHERE dispatch_status = 'RUNNING' AND equipment_id IN ('DSP-01', 'GRN-01', 'FBD-01', 'BLN-01', 'TPR-01', 'COT-01', 'BLS-01', 'CRT-01')

reports.title: Pharma Job Board (ISA-95/ISA-88)
reports.description: Active job orders on solid dosage and packaging lines with dispatch status.
reports.query:
SELECT o.job_order_id AS id, o.job_no, COALESCE(s.external_ref, '') AS external_ref,
       COALESCE(o.command, '') AS command, o.dispatch_status, o.equipment_id,
       COALESCE(r.product_definition_id, '') AS product_definition_id, r.quantity, COALESCE(r.uom, '') AS uom,
       o.planned_start, o.planned_end, o.created_at
FROM emc_job_order o
JOIN emc_work_request r ON r.request_id = o.request_id
JOIN emc_work_schedule s ON s.schedule_id = r.schedule_id
WHERE o.dispatch_status NOT IN ('ENDED', 'ABORTED', 'CANCELLED')
  AND o.equipment_id IN ('DSP-01', 'GRN-01', 'FBD-01', 'BLN-01', 'TPR-01', 'COT-01', 'BLS-01', 'CRT-01')
ORDER BY o.planned_start ASC, o.job_no

reports.title: Quarantine & Batch Release
reports.description: Lots in QUARANTINE disposition with GTIN, batch number and expiry date.
reports.query:
SELECT l.lot_id, l.barcode, l.definition_id AS material_id, l.status,
       COALESCE(l.disposition, '') AS disposition, l.quantity, l.base_uom AS uom,
       COALESCE(l.storage_location, '') AS storage_location,
       COALESCE(pb.prop_value, '') AS batch_no, COALESCE(pg.prop_value, '') AS gtin,
       COALESCE(pe.prop_value, '') AS expiry_date
FROM emc_material_lot l
LEFT JOIN emc_material_lot_property pb ON pb.lot_id = l.lot_id AND pb.prop_key = 'batch_no'
LEFT JOIN emc_material_lot_property pg ON pg.lot_id = l.lot_id AND pg.prop_key = 'gtin'
LEFT JOIN emc_material_lot_property pe ON pe.lot_id = l.lot_id AND pe.prop_key = 'expiry_date'
WHERE l.disposition = 'QUARANTINE'
ORDER BY l.lot_id

reports.title: Serial Code Registry
reports.description: DataMatrix serial codes with GTIN and aggregation (parent code).
reports.query:
SELECT serial_code, COALESCE(gtin, '') AS gtin, COALESCE(lot_id, '') AS lot_id,
       COALESCE(job_no, '') AS job_no, COALESCE(parent_code, '') AS parent_code,
       status, created_at
FROM pha_serial_record
ORDER BY created_at DESC, serial_code

reports.title: E-Signature Audit (21 CFR Part 11)
reports.description: Electronic signature journal: who signed what, meaning and time.
reports.query:
SELECT entity_type, entity_id, signer, meaning,
       COALESCE(comment_text, '') AS comment_text, signed_at
FROM pha_esign_record
ORDER BY signed_at DESC

metadata.changelog: 1.1.0 operator UI rework: flat widget format, dropdown selects from catalog reports, row-click autofill, KPI cards (requires erp-mes-core 1.1.0)
